title: scutellaria tuberosa
intro: Scutellaria tuberosa, also known as Butterfly Balm or Pale Yellow Skuellaria, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Scutellaria tuberosa include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. In traditional medicine, Scutellaria tuberosa is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to treat various health conditions.
